_comment: claude-goal hook wiring. install.sh merges these into your project's .claude/settings.json (with backup + dedupe). These FOUR core hooks + the statusline are what make /goal autonomous; see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for what each does. SessionStart runs goal-cron-guard.sh: on every startup (incl. after a laptop crash) it prunes the durable resume cron + stale session claims and self-heals re-activated goals once no goal is genuinely active — so a finished goal or a crash never leaves the cron firing forever. The scope-lock hook (goal-scope-check.sh) is intentionally NOT here — it is OPT-IN, because it auto-reverts out-of-scope edits and a too-narrow scope can discard real work; enable it deliberately per docs/SETUP.md. ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.} resolves to your project root with a safe fallback.
